## Preserved prior README notes

<!-- PRESERVED PRIOR README START -->
# Lean Answer-Evidence Project

This folder is the anonymous-review Lean 4 project for the benchmark's
mechanized evidence.

## Scope

The export contains two lanes:

- `KO7Benchmark` -- the locked answer-key lane used by the scoring pipeline;
- `KO7BenchmarkTheory` -- the separate theory lane used for theorem-level
  appendix claims, when that root is present in the released stack.

The answer-key lane is gated by the frozen source-side lock, so future
theory-side additions cannot silently change the scoring provenance surface.

## Build

Requires Lean 4 v4.22.0-rc4. The anonymous mirror already pins dependencies in
`lakefile.lean` and `lake-manifest.json`.

From this folder:

```powershell
python ..\prepare_review_workspace.py --apply
lake update
lake build KO7Benchmark
lake build KO7BenchmarkTheory
```

The first command is optional. It rewrites `<workspace>` placeholders elsewhere
in the anonymous mirror to your local checkout path so reviewer-facing docs and
helper scripts point to the directory where you unpacked the repo.
<!-- PRESERVED PRIOR README END -->
